title: Registry collection entry
description: One file per collection at publishers/<ns>/<name>.yaml. `ns` is a free-form publisher slug (e.g. "stripe") allocated first-come, first-served by maintainer review — there is no automated ownership check. A pointer to one or more published versions of a Bruno/OpenCollection; each version is independently sourced (git or url). The registry stores no usage stats and generates no index.json — the registry server projects these files into its own store.

ns.description: Publisher namespace slug (e.g. "stripe"). Must match the <ns> folder. Allocated manually, first-come first-served.

name.description: Collection name. Must match the <name> filename.

title.description: Display title shown in search and on the detail page.

summary.description: One sentence shown under the title in search.

type.description: The kind of entry. Only collections for now.

version-tracking.description: How versions are maintained: derived from git tags, or listed manually.

verified.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

official.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

featured.description: EDITORIAL — set by maintainers during review. Omit when submitting.

versions.description: Every published version; order doesn't matter (latest is derived by semver). Add one entry per version via PR; `type` may differ across versions (e.g. v1.0 from git, v1.1 from url).

version.description: Semver version: major.minor.patch, optional -prerelease (e.g. "1.0.0", "2.1.3-beta.1"). Compared by semver precedence to pick the latest.

type.description: How `source.url` is resolved: clone a git repo, or download a hosted artifact.

url.description: For type=git: the repo URL to clone. For type=url: the direct download URL of the opencollection artifact.

ref.description: git only: tag, branch or commit to check out (defaults to the repo's default branch).

subdir.description: git only: path within the repo where the collection lives, if not the root.

hash.description: Optional SHA-256 of the resolved opencollection artifact, SRI-style "sha256-<base64>". Verified client-side after download.
